creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #8)

Yes, ports-bugs seems t obe the right mail address. There is bug #221218 requesting to prohibit ports@ being added to Cc/Assignee. 

I am fairly sure that freebsd- prefix is optional for all mailing lists. Otherwise prefix-less form wouldn't be used in MAINTAINER field unconditionally.
